findings: Counts are filesystem-based (find *.json in queue/claimed/results dirs) — stampede-monitor.sh:87-89
Agent liveness via tmux pane status, NOT PID files (which exist but are unused by monitor)
Orphan recovery 180s delay inflates claimed count during agent death (stampede-monitor.sh:274)
No explicit failed-task counter—failures inferred from absence of results
Metaswarm rollups trust commander self-report in swarm-state.json with no cross-validation against child-agents.jsonl
